description: System state snapshot — read delta state, work queue, recent activity, write structured JSON

steps.name: build_snapshot
steps.cmd: python -u -c "import json,os,datetime;s=json.load(open(os.path.join(os.environ['TEMP'],'atlas_state.json')));w=json.load(open(os.path.join(os.environ['TEMP'],'atlas_work.json')));t=json.load(open(os.path.join(os.environ['TEMP'],'atlas_timeline.json')));evts=t if isinstance(t,list) else t.get('events',t.get('timeline',[]));work_evts=sorted([e for e in evts if 'WORK' in str(e.get('type',''))],key=lambda x:x['ts'],reverse=True)[:5];out_dir=os.path.join(os.path.dirname(os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__))),'output') if '__file__' in dir() else os.path.join(os.getcwd(),'output');os.makedirs(out_dir,exist_ok=True);snap={'timestamp':datetime.datetime.utcnow().isoformat()+'Z','mode':s.get('mode'),'constraints':{'build_allowed':w.get('build_allowed'),'max_concurrent':w.get('capacity',{}).get('max_concurrent'),'max_queue':w.get('capacity',{}).get('max_queue'),'closure_ratio':w.get('closure_ratio')},'capacity':{'active':w.get('capacity',{}).get('active',0),'available':w.get('capacity',{}).get('available',0),'queue_depth':w.get('capacity',{}).get('queue_depth',0)},'recent_activity':[{'ts':e['ts'],'type':e['type'],'title':e.get('data',{}).get('title',''),'duration_ms':e.get('data',{}).get('duration_ms',None)} for e in work_evts[:5]],'health':'operational' if s.get('mode') else 'degraded','next_actions':['Monitor queue throughput under load','Add failure alerting for WORK_FAILED events','Define task contracts for each command profile']};f=open(os.path.join(out_dir,'atlas_snapshot.json'),'w');json.dump(snap,f,indent=2);f.close();print(json.dumps(snap,indent=2))"
